creator: alexander.borkowski@opus-b.com
text: In the handbook section 13.2.1. "Preventing Logins" the path to nologin is used inconsistently: The first time the path is given as /sbin/nologin, the other two times as /usr/sbin/nologin. Looking at bug #116758 it should likely be /usr/sbin/nologin in the first instance as well.
